questions.question: What is the primary use of SMS in the context of Location Based Services?
options: To track location of users in real time
To send location-based updates to emergency contacts
To receive notifications of location changes
questions.explanation: To send location-based updates to emergency contacts

questions.question: What is the benefit of using location based services in telephony?
How does SMS Telephony interact with Location Based Services?
options: By sending location updates to emergency contacts via SMS
By providing location information to the user's phone
By receiving location data from nearby cell towers
By combining both SMS and GPS technologies
questions.explanation: By receiving location data from nearby cell towers

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using Location Based Services in SMS Telephony?
Which technology is used to determine the location of a device using SMS Telephony?
